---
title: "Gale Business Insights"
page-layout: article
---

# Gale Business Insights

**Provider:** Gale

## Description

Business information platform providing company profiles, SWOT analyses, industry coverage, market share data, histories, chronologies, and articles. Supports company and industry research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=http://infotrac.galegroup.com/itweb/29002?db=BIG)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
